calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Determining Title To Interest In Certain Trust Assets
Off Calendar Apr-22-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Myron Greenberg, via ZOOM, counsel for Leslie Koelsch and Rita Kriken, Petitioners.

At the outset, the court advises counsel that an amendment to include prayer for reformation may be required in order for the court to grant this petition. The court also confirms that the additional parcel for the staircase had the same street address and APN as the original parcel. After further discussion, the court queries Mr. Greenberg regarding whether he knows of any objection to the court granting the petition - Mr. Greenberg believes that there are no objections.

The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn; Clerk: Robert Woods; Bailiff: Deputy Tauscher. Not Reported.
